summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Analytics Dashboard feature (iteration 5). All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: dashboard loads at /analytics for admin, shows 8 stat cards, Monthly Trends bar chart (6 months), Tier Distribution pie chart, Onboarding Completion progress bars, Job Analytics (by Industry, Location, Work Type, Job Type), Account Details table. Refresh and Export CSV buttons work. Non-admin users (recruiter, job seeker) correctly denied access - no Analytics link in navigation and redirected away when accessing /analytics directly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented (existing issue from iteration 3, not related to Analytics)

critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoint correctly restricted to admin users only via verify_admin_user dependency
Navigation.js correctly checks user.role === 'admin' before showing Analytics link
AnalyticsDashboard.js properly fetches from both /api/admin/stats and /api/admin/analytics
Monthly trends correctly returns 6 months of historical data
CSV export is client-side using JavaScript Blob - builds CSV from loaded data including all sections
Account Details section has defaultOpen={false} - correctly collapsed by default
All stat cards have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard fully tested. Admin user can access /analytics with full stats and charts. Non-admin users are redirected. API returns: monthly_trends (6 months), jobs_by_industry, jobs_by_location, jobs_by_work_type, jobs_by_job_type, applications_by_status, onboarding (job_seekers and recruiters completion), accounts_detail, top_jobs. The /api/admin/stats endpoint returns summary with revenue, counts, tier_distribution.

analytics_dashboard_loads_for_admin.details: Admin user sees full Analytics Dashboard at /analytics with title, stat cards, charts, tables

non_admin_redirect.details: Recruiter and Job Seeker users redirected away from /analytics

analytics_nav_link_admin_only.details: Analytics link visible in navigation only for admin users

snapshot_stat_cards.details: 8 stat cards displayed: Monthly Revenue (R 77,396), Total Accounts (4), Total Users (17), Active Jobs (11), Applications (0), New Accounts 30d (4), Active Add-ons (0), Extra User Seats (0)

monthly_trends_chart.details: Bar chart shows 6 months of data (Sep 2025 - Feb 2026) with Accounts, Applications, Jobs, Users series

tier_distribution_chart.details: Pie chart displays distribution across 4 tiers (Starter, Growth, Pro, Enterprise)

onboarding_completion.details: Shows Job Seekers 3/5 (60%) and Recruiters completion rates with progress bars

jobs_by_industry_chart.details: Horizontal bar chart showing jobs by industry (Financial Technology, Technology, General, Tech)

jobs_by_location_chart.details: Horizontal bar chart showing jobs by location (Cape Town Western Cape, Johannesburg, etc.)

jobs_by_work_type_chart.details: Pie chart showing Remote: 5, Onsite: 5, Hybrid: 4

account_details_table.details: Table with columns: Company, Tier, Status, Owner, Users, Jobs, Apps, MRR, Created. Shows 4 accounts.

account_details_collapsed_default.details: Account Details section is collapsed by default (defaultOpen={false}), expands on click

refresh_button.details: Refresh button reloads data with force_refresh=true parameter

export_csv_button.details: Export to CSV button triggers client-side CSV download with all sections

api_admin_analytics_access_control.details: GET /api/admin/analytics returns 200 for admin, 403 for recruiter/job seeker

api_admin_stats_access_control.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns 200 for admin with summary and tier_distribution

api_returns_expected_data_structures.details: Analytics API returns monthly_trends (6 items), jobs_by_industry, jobs_by_location, jobs_by_work_type, jobs_by_job_type, onboarding, accounts_detail, top_jobs

mocked_integrations.payfast: Sandbox mode - Payfast payment gateway is in sandbox mode for testing
